author: lOrm
content: Landed src/config/stop_conditions.rs with StopConditionsConfig { max_turns, max_total_input_tokens, max_total_output_tokens, stop_on_finish_reasons }, TurnSnapshot, and StopReason enum (MaxTurns/InputTokenBudget/OutputTokenBudget/MatchedFinishReason). is_stop_condition_met() takes a TurnSnapshot and returns Option<StopReason>. is_active() lets the loop short-circuit when no rules set. Added stop_conditions: StopConditionsConfig field on AppConfig. 6 tests pin: default inactive / max_turns boundary / zero caps mean unlimited / token budgets fire at-or-above threshold / finish_reason matching / YAML round trip / stable stop_reason codes. Turn-loop integration in pipeline.rs deliberately scoped out (forbidden-files territory); the predicate is now ready for that integration.
